violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The oven doors were observed in poor repair, with handle cracked and door not closing properly. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
A leak was observed at the 3-bay faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. PIC states that they have been in contact with RIDOH office regarding matter. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Thermometer indicated highest surface temperature was 144.6 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The dish machine was in poor repair, not reaching proper temperature for sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. PIC stated custodial staff are ordering parts. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. PIC stated application has been submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Pepperoni and sliced peaches were observed date marks exceeding 7 days. PIC stated that staff are in process of going through items and disposing as part of their morning routine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Grab-and-go items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided guidance during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
A dead mouse was observed on a glue trap in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC stated the items were being returned; delivery driver arrived and took food items to return during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Reach-in freezer located in the rear of kitchen was not in good repair, non-functional at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

Fiberboard is used in the construction of shelving in the dry storage area. Finish on the wood shelf on service line is worn, affecting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC stated work is scheduled. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Walk-in refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair, missing on the wooden door. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. Inspector observed that the self-closing mechanism was not working to close the door. PIC stated work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Rolls packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
At the time of inspection, single service items (trays) were being stored on the floor in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Wood is used in the construction of a shelf beneath the serving line in the kitchen, and shelves in the dry storage area made of fiberboard. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher (shelf) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
The hand-washing sink in the dishwasher area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dishwasher area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Cherry tomatoes were rinsed and returned to the containers they came in, not placed into a clean and sanitized container. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Salads and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Cucumbers were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. As only the ends had been cut off, cucumbers were allowed to be washed and used. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Wood is used in the construction of a shelf beneath the serving line in the kitchen, and shelves in the dry storage area made of fiberboard. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
the establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink. There is currently a 2 bay sink, and a high-temp dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

Thermometer is lacking in the milk cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023

Yogurt parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the back storage area and kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Serving utensils for the line observed stored on an unclean surface (unclean shelf beneath hot hold area) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on the line, and in the serving area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The table mixer was not in good repair, with areas of rust, and with many parts of the plating missing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Wood is used in the construction of a shelf beneath the serving line in the kitchen, and shelves in the dry storage area are made of fiberboard. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
The establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink. There is currently a 2 bay sink, and a high-temp dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and lower counters have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The milk cooler and chest freezer have an accumulation of frost and debris. The wall-mounted fan has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

The fan cover in the walk in cooler with the wood door has an accumulation dust and debris. Old rodent droppings observed on shelves in the dry storage area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area, such as the large floor mixer. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
